title: UPSSSC – Combined Lower Subordinate Services – 2285 Posts

basic_details.job_title: UPSSSC Lower PCS Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 2285 Clerk, Executive Officer and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Uttar Pradesh Subordinate Services Selection Commission (UPSSSC) Recruitment 2026 for posts of 2285 Combined Lower Subordinate Services. Candidates with Any Bachelors Degree, LLB Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 29-05-2026, and closes on 18-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through UPSSSC website, upsssc.gov.in.
basic_details.post_name: Multiple Posts across 11 Departments (See Vacancy Table)

application_fee.general_fee: Rs.25/- (Online processing fee only, for all categories)

age_limit.age_details: 21 to 40 years (post-wise, as on 1st July of the recruitment year)

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's Degree from a recognised university (Graduate Level)

salary_details.pay_scale: Level-4 to Level-6 (Rs.25,500–1,12,400) depending on post

how_to_apply: Eligible candidates for UPSSSC Combined Lower Subordinate Services Recruitment 2026 must apply online through the official UPSSSC portal before the last date.
